title: M.Sc Jobs 2026 – Paid Intern
shortInfo: Defence Institute of Biodefence Technologies (DRDO DIBT) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Paid Intern. Candidates with M.Sc. Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 15-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through DRDO DIBT official website.

basic_details.job_title: DRDO DIBT Paid Intern Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Defence Institute of Biodefence Technologies (DRDO DIBT) Recruitment 2026 for 2 posts of Paid Intern. Candidates with M.Sc. Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 15-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through DRDO DIBT official website.

application_fee.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Final Year M.Sc. in Biotechnology or Microbiology from recognized Indian University/Institute
qualification.details: Final Year M.Sc. in Biotechnology or Microbiology from a recognized Indian University/Institute.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the DRDO DIBT Paid Intern positions?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the DRDO DIBT Paid Intern positions is 15th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for the Paid Intern role?
faq.answer: Candidates must be in their final year of M.Sc. in Biotechnology or Microbiology from a recognized Indian University or Institute to be eligible for this internship.

faq.question: How much is the stipend for the Paid Intern position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Paid Intern positions will receive a stipend of Rs. 5000 per month for the duration of their internship.

faq.question: What is the application process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process involves sending your complete bio-data and required documents via email to the designated address before the last date of application.

faq.question: Are there any application fees for the DRDO DIBT Paid Intern recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there are no application fees mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for the Paid Intern post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Paid Intern post, with one position each in Biotechnology and Microbiology.

faq.question: What is the selection process for the Paid Intern positions?
faq.answer: The selection will be based on academic merit, specifically requiring candidates to have 85% and above marks or a CGPA of >8.5 on a scale of 10.

faq.question: Where is the Defence Institute of Biodefence Technologies located?
faq.answer: The Defence Institute of Biodefence Technologies is located in Mysuru, Karnataka, with the pincode 570011.

faq.question: Is this a permanent job?
faq.answer: No, the job type for this Paid Intern position is contractual, meaning it is for a fixed period and not a permanent government job.

faq.question: When will the selected students be informed?
faq.answer: Selected students will be informed about their selection on 20th June 2026, and the internship is scheduled to commence on 01st July 2026.

seo_tags: Defence Institute of Biodefence Technologies Biotechnology
